finalObjective: Assemble the required allies and key items, defeat the giant Ghoul in the castle, and enter the portal to escape.
victorySequence: Trade and negotiate with NPCs to gather critical items.
Recruit cooperative NPC followers for the castle approach.
Travel with followers to the castle grounds.
Defeat the giant Ghoul guarding the portal.
Reach and activate the portal to finish the run.

milestones.title: Complete the trade chain for key progress items
milestones.description: Obtain the specific items needed for castle access and Ghoul preparation by negotiating with NPCs.

milestones.title: Recruit enough followers to approach the castle
milestones.description: Earn trust and cooperation from sidekicks and allied NPCs who will travel with the hero.

milestones.title: Lead the castle push and defeat the Ghoul
milestones.description: Coordinate the final approach, survive the castle route, and remove the Ghoul threat.
